releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- The plugin now supports a multilingual UI. By default, it follows your current Obsidian language, and it can also be overridden manually in plugin settings.
- Added language support for English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, German, Spanish, French, Portuguese (including pt-BR), Japanese, and Arabic.
- The Create Note view, settings page, top banner, and date/calendar locale handling are now connected to the same i18n flow.

## Other Updates

- Added multilingual notes to both `README.md` and `README-ZH.md`.
- Updated the example repository link and adjusted ignore rules.

## Usage

- By default, the plugin follows your current Obsidian language.
- If you want to lock the plugin to a specific language, you can choose it from `Language` in the plugin settings.
- Existing command names will reflect the new language after reloading the plugin.

releases.author: quanru
releases.description:
## What's New

### BulletRecordListByTime (#94)
- New `BulletRecordListByTime` code block view for weekly/monthly/quarterly/yearly notes
- Collects non-task bullet items from daily notes' Daily Record section within the date range

### Move between PARA categories (#59)
- Right-click context menu on PARA subfolders to move between Projects, Areas, Resources, and Archives

### Custom periodic note date formats (#85)
- Customize the date format for each periodic note type (Daily/Weekly/Monthly/Quarterly/Yearly)
- Available under Advanced Settings with live preview and format reference link
- Format must start with the default format to ensure compatibility with existing queries

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes
- fix: use isoWeekYear consistently for weekly file path generation (#109)
- fix: header regex now correctly preserves sub-header content (#108)
- fix: use Math.floor instead of toFixed for time carry calculation (#107)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🎉 First Stable Release

LifeOS (formerly Obsidian Periodic PARA) — a life management system combining periodic notes with the PARA organizational method.

### Core Features
- Periodic Notes: Daily, Weekly, Monthly, Quarterly, Yearly
- PARA System: Projects, Areas, Resources, Archives
- Query code blocks: TaskDoneListByTime, TaskRecordListByTime, ProjectListByTime, etc.
- Integration with Dataview plugin
